rationale: Chemistry L5 only for the named-target chemistry communities where authors publish by molecule class. Kinase chemistry splits by kinase family + chemistry approach; PROTAC chemistry by E3 ligase used; GPCR by named class A/B/C splits + biased agonism; catalysis families where the named catalyst IS the topic. Skip rest where L4 is the working unit.

leaves.name: TYK2 & JAK-Selective Chemistry
leaves.tagline: TYK2-selective inhibitors, JAK1-selective, JAK3-selective chemistry.

leaves.name: KRAS-G12C Specific Chemistry
leaves.tagline: KRAS-G12C-specific covalent chemistry, sotorasib + adagrasib lineage, allosteric pockets.

leaves.name: KRAS-G12D Chemistry
leaves.tagline: KRAS-G12D-specific chemistry, non-covalent KRAS, RAS(ON) inhibitors.

leaves.name: Pan-RAS Inhibitor Chemistry
leaves.tagline: Pan-RAS inhibitor chemistry, RAS(ON) inhibitors, multi-allele RAS.

leaves.name: Allosteric MEK Inhibitor Chemistry
leaves.tagline: Allosteric MEK inhibitors, allosteric kinase design strategies.

leaves.name: Covalent Fragment Screens
leaves.tagline: Covalent fragment screens, electrophile design, warhead selection.

leaves.name: Biased Agonism in GPCRs
leaves.tagline: Biased agonism in GPCRs, signaling-selective design (μ-opioid biased agonists).

leaves.name: Structure-Based GPCR Drug Design
leaves.tagline: Structure-based GPCR drug design, cryo-EM-guided GPCR chemistry.

leaves.name: CRBN-Recruiting PROTACs
leaves.tagline: CRBN-recruiting PROTACs, IMiD lineage, cereblon ligand design.

leaves.name: VHL-Recruiting PROTACs
leaves.tagline: VHL-recruiting PROTACs, VHL ligand design, comparative VHL vs CRBN.

leaves.tagline: IAP-recruiting + MDM2-recruiting PROTACs, broader E3 ligase recruiters.

leaves.name: DCAF15 & Novel E3 Recruiters
leaves.tagline: DCAF15-recruiting molecular glues, FEM1B, broader E3 ligase landscape.

leaves.name: Molecular Glue Screening
leaves.tagline: Molecular glue screening, chemical proteomics for glue discovery, structure-based glue design.

leaves.name: Grubbs Catalyst Lineage (ROMP)
leaves.tagline: Grubbs catalyst lineage (Gen II/III), Z-selective metathesis catalysts.

leaves.name: Compound Libraries & DEL Screens
leaves.tagline: DNA-encoded library (DEL) screens, virtual screening libraries, DEL-ML approaches.

leaves.name: Fragment-Based Drug Discovery (FBDD)
leaves.tagline: Fragment-based drug discovery (FBDD), fragment growing + linking strategies.

leaves.name: GLP-1 & GIP/GLP-1 Medchem
leaves.tagline: GLP-1 + GIP/GLP-1 medchem, peptide + small-molecule incretin design.

leaves.tagline: Ionizable lipid design for LNPs, organ-targeted LNP chemistry, novel ionizable lipid scaffolds.

leaves.name: CO2RR Selective Catalysts (Cu, Ag, Sn)
leaves.tagline: Cu-based CO2RR catalysts for C2+, Ag/Sn for CO/formate selectivity, single-atom CO2RR.

leaves.name: OER Catalysts (Ir Replacement)
leaves.tagline: OER catalysts as Ir/Ru replacements, Ni-Fe oxyhydroxide OER catalysts.

leaves.tagline: ORR PGM-free catalysts (Fe-N-C, Co-N-C), single-atom + carbon-supported ORR.

leaves.tagline: N2RR catalysts with HER suppression, indirect electrochemical NH3 synthesis (Li-mediated).

leaves.name: Fe, Co, Ni Single-Atom Catalysts
leaves.tagline: Fe-N-C, Co-N-C, Ni-N-C single-atom catalysts on carbon supports.

leaves.tagline: Ni + Fe on oxide supports, alloy catalysts for hydrogenation + reforming.

leaves.name: Zeolite Shape Selectivity & Frameworks
leaves.tagline: Zeolite shape selectivity, modern zeolite frameworks (MFI, BEA, FAU).

leaves.tagline: MOF acid-base catalysis, post-synthetic MOF functionalization for catalysis.

leaves.tagline: Chiral bisphosphines (BINAP, DUPHOS family), modern chiral ligand design.

leaves.tagline: NHC ligand families, pincer ligands, mixed-donor pincer designs.

leaves.tagline: DNP for ssNMR applications in materials + biology, hyperpolarized 13C metabolic imaging research.

leaves.tagline: NequIP, MACE, Allegro, equivariant ML interatomic potentials for chemistry.

leaves.tagline: CO2 capture MOFs (mmen-Mg2(dobpdc), amine-functionalized MOFs).

leaves.tagline: Rotaxanes, catenanes, modern mechanically interlocked molecule design.

leaves.tagline: Supramolecular cages, Pd-cages, organic cage design + cage-based catalysis.

leaves.tagline: RAFT-derived block + gradient + telechelic architectures.

leaves.tagline: ATRP-derived block + brush architectures, ARGET ATRP for biocompatible synthesis.

leaves.name: Block Copolymer Lithography
leaves.tagline: Block copolymer lithography, DSA (directed self-assembly), sub-10-nm patterning.

uncovered_concerns: Chemistry L5 only covers medchem, catalysis, photoredox + cross-coupling where the field publishes by named catalyst/target.
Skipped polymer chemistry, environmental chemistry, MOF subtypes — L4 already at named-family granularity for those.
